title: hieracium sparsum subsp. idae
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. idae, also known as Mountain Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Hieracium sparsum subsp. idae can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions for use in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
